[2019-02-06 19:26] apooche: Q defense doesn’t know that forcefield is a valid back of the stack defender. So it just thinks the back of stack is nothing, and soaks 3 health how it would normally soak 3 health.
[2019-02-06 19:29] apooche: There are a few cases with fragile only where it makes these mistakes. For example I believe if you take 9 into two Aegis and 4 engi, it keeps a 5 health Aegis rather than 1 health Aegis and 4 engis.
